nasb.text: He who trusts in his own heart is a fool, But he who walks wisely will be delivered.

esv.text: Whoever trusts in his own mind is a fool, but he who walks in wisdom will be delivered.

cnv.text: 自恃聰明的，是愚昧人； 憑著智慧行事的，必蒙拯救。

ccb.text: 愚人心中自以为是， 凭智慧行事的平安稳妥。

csbs.text: 心里依靠自己的，是愚昧人； 藉着智慧行事的，必蒙拯救。
